title: Beauty Formulas Vitamin C Moisturiser Cream for Face, Neck - Brightening Hydrating Face Cream with Vitamin C, E, B for Women, Daily Skin Care Moisturiser All Skin Types 100 ml, 3 pack+Cheeroo Magnet

features: Vitamin C Miracle - This Beauty Formulas Brightening Vitamin C Moisturiser Cream for Face and Neck is enriched with Vitamin C, B, E which help in activating the production of collagen, making the skin more elastic and giving it a natural, healthy shine.

Nourishing and Regenerating - Brightening Hydrating Face Cream deeply nourishes your skin and has regenerating properties thanks to the inclusion of Panthenol and natural oils. It effectively eliminates dryness and prevents the appearance of an unpleasant feeling of tightness.

Daily Skin Care Moisturiser - made with a combination of effective moisturisers to quickly rehydrate your skin, boosting your natural youthful glow. Surprise, but effective both for women and men skin care routine.

Non-Greasy Texture - The facial moisturiser cream has a light, elegant, and non-greasy texture that is swiftly absorbed, leaving your skin feeling soft and supple. Perfect for all skin types as daily routine.
Free Cheeroo Magnet - each moisturiser set contains 3x Beauty Formulas Vitamin C Daily Moisturiser Cream for Face, Neck, 100 ml each plus lovely free Cheeroo Magnet that cheers you up!
description: Product description The Beauty Formulas Brightening Vitamin C Daily Moisturiser Cream is an indispensable facial moisturiser in your daily skin care routine. This vitamin C cream is designed to provide your skin with intensive moisturising and regenerating effects. Crafted with a mix of Vitamins C, E, B and natural oils, this face cream actively eliminates dryness and prevents the appearance of an unpleasant feeling of tightness. It's the perfect face moisturiser for women and men who are looking for a product that deeply nourishes and brightens the skin. This vitamin C face cream is light, elegant, and non-greasy texture is swiftly absorbed, leaving your skin feeling soft and supple. Beauty Formulas Brightening Vitamin C Daily Moisturiser Cream is your ideal day cream for a natural youthful glow. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes
